🌿 What We Offer

Services & Panchkarma

Comprehensive Ayurvedic care — from specialized liver treatments to classical Panchkarma therapies, herbal medicine and integrated wellness programmes.

Our Treatments

Clinical Services

Ayurvedic care with a primary focus on liver health and holistic wellness

🫁

Liver Disease Treatment

Specialized Ayurvedic protocols for fatty liver, hepatitis, elevated SGPT/SGOT, liver cirrhosis and jaundice using classical hepatoprotective formulations.

💆

Panchkarma Detox

Authentic detoxification — Virechana, Basti, Abhyangam, Shirodhara and specialized liver detox Panchkarma for deep cellular rejuvenation.

🌿

Classical Herbal Medicine

Time-tested formulations — Arogyavardhini Vati, Katuki, Bhumi Amla, Punarnava — prepared using classical Ayurvedic recipes.

🧘

Yoga & Lifestyle

Integrated wellness including Ayurvedic dietary counselling, yoga therapy and lifestyle modification for sustainable liver health.

🔬

Diagnostic Consultation

In-depth Ayurvedic diagnosis using Nadi Pariksha combined with modern investigations for accurate liver disease assessment.

🏕️

Community Health Camps

Regular free Ayurvedic health camps across Greater Noida NCR — liver screenings and consultations for communities.

Therapies

Panchkarma Treatments

Authentic classical detoxification and rejuvenation therapies

💧

Virechana

Therapeutic purgation for deep liver and gut detoxification. The cornerstone of Ayurvedic liver disease treatment — highly effective for fatty liver and jaundice.

🫙

Basti

Medicated enema therapy — one of the most powerful Panchkarma treatments for chronic liver support and deep detoxification.

🤲

Abhyangam

Full-body Ayurvedic oil massage for deep tissue nourishment, stress relief and improved circulation of nutrients to the liver.

🏺

Shirodhara

Continuous warm oil flow on the forehead — deeply relaxing therapy for stress, anxiety, insomnia and neurological conditions.

🌿

Swedana

Herbal steam therapy that opens channels, reduces stiffness and prepares the body for deeper Panchkarma detox procedures.

✨

Udvartana

Herbal powder massage for weight management, skin rejuvenation and improving lymphatic circulation — excellent for obesity-related fatty liver.
